name: Bard
summary: A versatile performer who casts occult spells and inspires allies.
description: Bards use artistic performance to cast occult spells, bolster allies, and demoralize foes. A bard's versatility makes them a valuable addition to any adventuring party, providing healing, buffs, and battlefield control through their compositions and spells. They draw power from the occult tradition, tapping into the fundamental truths hidden in art and emotion.

name: Champion
summary: A divine warrior bound by a sacred oath to protect allies.
description: Champions are divine warriors who have sworn sacred oaths and received power from their deity in return. They use heavy armor and divine magic to protect their allies, smite the enemies of their faith, and serve as beacons of their deity's will. Their champion's reaction ability is a signature defensive feature that varies based on their cause.

name: Cleric
summary: A divine spellcaster who channels their deity's power to heal or harm.
description: Clerics are devoted followers of a deity who channel divine magic through their faith. They can choose to focus on healing (cloistered cleric) or combat (warpriest), and their font of divine power lets them cast heal or harm spells multiple times per day. Clerics serve as the primary healers in most adventuring parties.

name: Druid
summary: A primal spellcaster who draws power from the natural world.
description: Druids are primal spellcasters who draw their magic from the natural world and its fundamental forces. They follow druidic orders that determine their focus — whether animal companions, wild shape transformation, storm magic, or plant-based powers. Druids are bound by an anathema against using metal armor and shields.

name: Fighter
summary: A master of martial combat with unparalleled weapon expertise.
description: Fighters are masters of martial combat, with the highest base attack proficiency of any class. They excel with all manner of weapons and fighting styles, gaining access to powerful combat feats that let them control the battlefield. Their Attack of Opportunity reaction and superior weapon proficiency progression make them the most reliable damage dealers in melee.

name: Monk
summary: A disciplined martial artist who strikes with incredible speed and power.
description: Monks are disciplined martial artists who hone their bodies into deadly weapons. They fight with incredible speed, using Flurry of Blows to make multiple unarmed attacks and Ki Strikes to channel mystical energy. Monks have the fastest base movement speed of any class and can eventually gain incredible abilities like running on water or walls.

name: Ranger
summary: A skilled hunter and tracker who excels at fighting specific prey.
description: Rangers are skilled hunters and trackers who designate specific creatures as their prey, gaining bonuses against those targets. They can choose to focus on ranged combat, two-weapon fighting, animal companions, or snare crafting. Their Hunt Prey ability is the cornerstone of their combat effectiveness.

name: Rogue
summary: A cunning combatant who deals devastating sneak attacks.
description: Rogues are cunning, skillful combatants who rely on stealth, deception, and precision to defeat their foes. Their Sneak Attack ability lets them deal massive damage to flat-footed enemies, and they gain more skill increases and skill feats than any other class. Rogues can follow different rackets that emphasize different playstyles.

name: Sorcerer
summary: A spontaneous spellcaster whose magic comes from an innate bloodline.
description: Sorcerers cast spells spontaneously through an innate connection to magic, typically inherited through a magical bloodline. Their bloodline determines which spell tradition they use (arcane, divine, occult, or primal) and grants them unique bloodline spells. Sorcerers know fewer spells than prepared casters but can cast any spell they know without preparation.

name: Wizard
summary: A scholarly spellcaster who prepares arcane spells from a spellbook.
description: Wizards are scholarly spellcasters who learn arcane magic through rigorous study and record their spells in spellbooks. They prepare spells each day, choosing from their spellbook to fill their spell slots. Wizards specialize in arcane schools of magic, gaining additional focus spells and abilities related to their chosen school. They have the largest potential spell repertoire of any class.

name: Witch
summary: A spellcaster who gains magic through a pact with a mysterious patron.
description: Witches gain their magic through a pact with a mysterious patron — an entity whose true nature is often unknown even to the witch. Their patron communicates through a familiar, which serves as the witch's spellbook. Witches can use any of the four spell traditions depending on their patron, and they gain access to hexes — unique focus spells that can debilitate their foes.

name: Swashbuckler
summary: A daring combatant who gains panache through stylish maneuvers.
description: Swashbucklers are daring martial combatants who fight with flair and style. By performing impressive feats in combat — tumbling through enemy spaces, demoralizing foes, or making dramatic flourishes — they gain panache, a state of heightened confidence that empowers their finishing strikes. Their style determines which actions grant panache and shapes their combat approach.
